_comment: Octobots agent registry. Most agents now live in the arozumenko/sdlc-skills monorepo and are installed via that single repo's installer. Each entry references either `monorepo: sdlc-skills` (with `name` = subdir under sdlc-skills/agents/) or `repo: owner/repo` for third-party agent repos kept on their own.

agents.name: scout
agents.description: Kit — codebase scout and project configurator

agents.name: project-manager
agents.description: Max — orchestrates tasks, routes work, tracks progress

agents.name: ba
agents.description: Alex — requirements, user stories, acceptance criteria

agents.name: tech-lead
agents.description: Rio — technical decomposition, interface design, code review
OneTest QA — 13 specialist domains (a11y, security, UX, performance, privacy...)

agents.name: personal-assistant
agents.description: PA — second-brain personal assistant: signals, knowledge base, open loops

presets.name: SDLC team
presets.description: Full delivery team — Scout onboards first, then BA, Tech Lead, PM, Python Dev, JS Dev, QA

presets.name: Personal assistant
presets.description: Solo PA — second-brain / journaling / inbox triage
